title: approvals — declared entitlements
description: Five entitlement keys. `approvals_enabled` is the core boolean gate (all tiers). Slot cap on max active templates per tenant scales with plan tier. Custom-template authoring + advanced expressions are feature-gated. Cross-tenant audit report generation is enterprise + compliance-module co-active only.

entitlements.description: Core feature gate. Always on. Small-tier tenants get the engine + shipped defaults; custom-template authoring is separately gated by approval_templates_custom.

Write custom approval templates. Small-tier tenants can only use system-shipped defaults (the seeder inserts a handful of common templates on tenant provisioning — refund-over-500, grant-issuance, impersonation-extension). Medium+ tier tenants can author their own.

Cap on is_active=true approval_templates rows per tenant across all applications. Enterprise = unlimited. Enforced by ApprovalTemplateObserver on create + activate; hard-refuses with TENANT_TEMPLATE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED past the cap.

Access to advanced selector functions: manager_of(), except(), chain_up_to(), and multi-line expressions with intermediate variables. Medium-tier gets the basic set (role, user, permission, owner_of, any, all). Enterprise-tier unlocks manager_of + except + chain_up_to. Enforced by ExpressionLanguageAdapter at template-save time.
Generate cross-tenant compliance snapshots. Requires enterprise tier AND compliance module co-active for the tenant. Applied at the POST /platform/approvals/audit-report endpoint level.
